search_parameters.q: cheap grocery stores in Portland, ME

search_information.query_displayed: cheap grocery stores in Portland, ME

local_results.title: Whole Foods Market
local_results.description: Mainstay for natural & organic food. Eco-minded chain with natural & organic grocery items, housewares & other products (most sell wine).
local_results.user_review: "Big selection of organic food reasonably priced"

local_results.title: Portland Food Co-op
local_results.description: Spacious market for local produce, plus organic goods and bulk staples.
local_results.user_review: "A good co-op with quality (and reasonably well priced) produce."

local_results.title: Hannaford
local_results.user_review: "Always great produce-delicious n fresh seafood-n low prices"

local_results.title: Save A Lot
local_results.description: Source for discount groceries. Discount supermarket chain carrying brand-name & private-label grocery items.
local_results.user_review:
"WOW,What a savings on my
Food budget
A Great place to save A LOT of money"

local_results.title: Trader Joe's
local_results.description: Specialty grocer with housebrand items. Grocery chain with a variety of signature items, plus produce, dairy & more (most sell wine & beer).
local_results.user_review: "The produce looked wonderful and priced reasonably."

local_results.title: Shaw's
local_results.description: Supermarket with a deli & a bakery. Supermarket chain offering meat, produce & other staples, plus deli & bakery items.
local_results.user_review: "Clean store, competitive prices, kind and helpfull staff, beautiful Deli!!"

local_results.title: La Bodega Latina Grocery Store
local_results.user_review: "They have economic prices and a wide variety of Hispanic goods."

local_results.title: ALDI
local_results.user_review: "I walked out with a cart full of $200 worth of groceries!"

local_results.title: Hong Kong Market
local_results.user_review: "Great selection of Asian products with good prices."

local_results.title: Shaw's
local_results.description: Supermarket with a deli & a bakery. Supermarket chain offering meat, produce & other staples, plus deli & bakery items.
local_results.user_review: "A very nice store that is well stocked and has good prices on groceries."

local_results.title: Peace Food Market
local_results.description: Tiny shop stocked with groceries (including Middle Eastern options) alongside friendly service.
local_results.user_review: "Cheap prices & a very helpful/polite cashier."

local_results.title: Milly’s Market
local_results.user_review: "Lots of items to choose from and prices were reasonable."

local_results.title: Union Wharf Market
local_results.description: Specialty shop for local food & products. Upmarket grocery offering coffee & snacks, plus pantry items sourced from area producers.
local_results.user_review: "I appreciate the quick convenience and high quality, fair price."

local_results.title: Sun Market
local_results.description: Compact store featuring an array of Asian groceries and snacks, plus kitchenware and spices, and sake.
local_results.user_review: "I like having a variety of spices with cheap prices."

local_results.title: Shaw's
local_results.description: Supermarket with a deli & a bakery. Supermarket chain offering meat, produce & other staples, plus deli & bakery items.
local_results.user_review: "Got 2 huge containers of precut strawberries for $10 total."

local_results.title: Micucci Grocery Co.
local_results.description: Grocery store selling Italian meats and wines, plus deli eats, fluffy pizza and slab pizza.
local_results.user_review: "Great store with very reasonable prices."

local_results.title: Sindbad Market
local_results.description: Market featuring Middle Eastern spices and meats, plus friendly service.
local_results.user_review: "They have amazing prices and products."

local_results.title: Browne Trading Market
local_results.user_review: "Great stuff, but be prepared to pay"

local_results.title: Hilltop Superette
local_results.user_review: "Basically two meals for $10."

local_results.title: Veranda Asian Market
local_results.description: Asian grocery store offering a wide selection of products such as produce, noodles, frozen foods, and banh mi.
local_results.user_review: "Best price for kimchi i've found in the area."
